commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a Telegram waiting status reaction for queued messages by threading a per-message onQueued callback through the command queue, embedded runner, auto-reply, and Telegram reaction handling, with focused tests and Telegram reaction 429 backoff.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established. Source inspection shows current main has no waiting status or onQueued queue signal and still uses nested session/global lanes, but I did not run a real Telegram queued-message scenario.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real Telegram proof and a current-main rebase are required before maintainer review; this is not a safe repair-lane candidate because automation cannot provide proof for the contributor's setup.
